command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 jose@192.168.0.201 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== cloudflared already on .201? ==="
which cloudflared 2>/dev/null && cloudflared --version 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT installed"
echo "=== existing cloudflared service? ==="
systemctl is-active cloudflared 2>/dev/null || echo "no service"
echo "=== OS / arch ==="
. /etc/os-release; echo "$ID $VERSION_ID"; dpkg --print-architecture
echo "=== can reach cloudflare to download? ==="
curl -sI -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://github.com/cloudflare/cloudflared/releases/latest 2>/dev/null || echo "no-internet"
echo ""
echo "=== resources on .201 ==="
free -h | head -2
uptime
REMOTE
